// Negative fixture for spec 120 R6 scan (e) (defense-in-depth):
// mirrors a real reverse-derivation site (an ID parsed back OUT of a
// branch name via strings.TrimPrefix of a workspace prefix) with its
// idvalidate gate DELETED. The scan must flag it RED.
package fixture

import (
	"strings"

	"github.com/mrmaxsteel/mindspec/internal/workspace"
)

func ungatedReverseDerivation(branch string) string {
	// idvalidate call deleted — this is the RED shape.
	beadID := strings.TrimPrefix(branch, workspace.BeadBranchPrefix)
	return beadID
}
